title: fagraea latibracteata
intro: Fagraea latibracteata, also known as the fragrant frangipani or white frangipani, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of fever and cough. Herbal preparations of Fagraea latibracteata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
